type: INTENT
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Adding debug=False/debug_logger params to __init__, guarded DEBUG logging calls at: state-reset block (top of receive), start-identifier-matched block, rolling end-check block, emit-chunk block (StreamResponse return), and end of flush(). Will only add log lines + a small _truncate_preview helper, not altering control flow/branching logic itself.

type: STATUS
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Done: added idle_timeout_s/_last_chunk_ts params in __init__ (after allow_reuse), a self._last_chunk_ts=time.time() refresh right after the chunk_message-is-None check in receive(), and a new tick(now_ts=None) method inserted between receive() and flush(). No control-flow changes to existing branches, should merge cleanly with your logging additions.

type: STATUS
